summary: Draft high-level conditional multi-cycle plan for context-engine auto mechanism with schema integrity as SOT.
blockers: No implementation-level spec; no src; no SDK.
nextActions: Produce 5-cycle orchestration plan (high-level only) with user authorization gate at end of each cycle: C1 Canonicalize schema contract

C3 Delegation packet normalization + multi-entry handling (halt/new/revert/team-parallel)

artifacts: Return concise phase map with stop conditions
decisions: Goal is integrity-first context engineering grounded on `.hivemind/plans/**` as SOT.
residualRisk: Overly abstract phases may miss operational edge-cases (revert, parallel teams, session forks).
